name: Iter11 — PR Comparison page UI and full flow
description: Verify the /compare page: two labeled URL inputs with colored borders, Compare PRs button, loading spinner, Score Comparison Banner with scores and delta arrow, Diff Summary table, side-by-side review columns, and Save Comparison button.

planSteps.description: The page heading 'Compare Two PRs' is visible
A label 'Old PR URL' with a red-tinted input field is visible
A label 'New PR URL' with a green-tinted input field is visible
A '⚡ Compare PRs' button is visible and initially disabled (both inputs empty)
Type 'https://github.com/vercel/next.js/pull/1' into the Old PR URL input
Type 'https://github.com/vercel/next.js/pull/2' into the New PR URL input
The '⚡ Compare PRs' button is now enabled
A loading spinner and 'Analyzing both PRs…' text appear
After the analysis completes (wait up to 120 seconds), the 'Score Comparison' section heading is visible
Two large score numbers are displayed — one in red (Old PR) and one in green (New PR)
A delta arrow (↑ or ↓) and point change value are visible between the two scores
A 'Diff Summary' section is visible with a table containing 'Category', 'Old PR', 'New PR', and 'Change' column headers
The Diff Summary table contains at least one row for 'Overall Score'
Two review column headers are visible: '❌ Old PR' and '✅ New PR'
A '💾 Save Comparison' button is visible at the bottom of the page
